products.title: WillowBee LoRaWAN Module
products.shortDescription: Compact LoRaWAN-enabled MCU module for low-power industrial end nodes.

products.title: LoRaWAN Temperature & Humidity Sensor
products.shortDescription: Temperature and humidity monitoring for indoor and outdoor industrial sites.

products.title: LoRaWAN CO2 Sensor
products.shortDescription: Indoor air quality sensor for CO2, TVOC and environmental monitoring.

products.title: LoRaWAN Modbus Bridge / Sensor
products.shortDescription: Wireless Modbus RTU integration for IIoT telemetry and industrial devices.

products.title: LoRaWAN IP67 Outdoor Temperature Sensor
products.shortDescription: Rugged outdoor temperature sensing for field deployments.

products.title: LoRaWAN Panic Button
products.shortDescription: Industrial panic button for emergency response and safety workflows.

products.title: LoRaWAN Battery Level Monitoring Sensor
products.shortDescription: Remote battery level monitoring for field assets and distributed systems.

products.title: LoRaWAN Soil Moisture Sensor
products.shortDescription: Soil moisture and soil temperature monitoring for agriculture and field research.

products.title: LoRaWAN Tilt Sensor
products.shortDescription: 3-axis tilt and acceleration monitoring for motion and tamper events.

products.title: LoRaWAN Indoor Tilt Sensor
products.shortDescription: Indoor tilt monitoring for cabinets, equipment and facility assets.

products.title: LoRaWAN Anemometer
products.shortDescription: Outdoor wind speed measurement for industrial and environmental monitoring.

products.title: LoRaWAN Door Sensor
products.shortDescription: Door open and close monitoring for facilities, cabinets and field enclosures.

products.title: LoRaWAN Ultrasonic Level Sensor
products.shortDescription: Ultrasonic distance and level sensing for tanks, manholes and water systems.

products.title: LoRaWAN Barometric Pressure Sensor
products.shortDescription: Pressure telemetry for liquid systems, pipelines and industrial tanks.

services.title: Embedded Hardware Design
services.summary: PCB, sensor design, rugged IoT gateways and low-power hardware.

services.title: Firmware Development
services.summary: MCU, RTOS, bare-metal, LoRaWAN stack and device drivers.

services.title: Backend API
services.summary: REST API, WebSocket, telemetry ingestion, auth and reporting.

services.title: PostgreSQL & Database Architecture
services.summary: Device data modeling, time-series data, reporting tables and dashboard queries.

services.title: Web Platform / Admin Panel
services.summary: Web dashboards, admin panels, customer portals and monitoring interfaces.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.summary: iOS / Android apps for field operations, sensor monitoring and notifications.

services.title: VR / Simulation
services.summary: Industrial training, product demos, digital twin and simulation presentations.

services.title: IoT Cloud / Telemetry
services.summary: Device fleet monitoring, alerts, integrations and remote data visualization.

news.title: WillowSoft at Embedded World 2026

news.title: WillowSoft Launches UK Operations in London
news.excerpt: The London operation supports UK and European customers with connected product engineering services.

news.title: Minister Varank Visit at Mugla Teknopark
news.excerpt: WillowSoft presented LoRaWAN sensor solutions and local IoT engineering capabilities during the visit.

news.title: WillowSoft at WIN EURASIA
news.excerpt: Industrial IoT solutions and LoRaWAN products were presented to manufacturing and automation teams.

news.title: TUBITAK LoRaWAN End Node Workshop
news.excerpt: WillowSoft contributed to LoRaWAN end-node design and training for embedded connectivity teams.

heroTitle.en: From bare metal to dashboard — without fragmented vendors.

heroLead.en: WillowSoft builds every layer of your connected product: hardware, firmware, connectivity, backend, and interfaces — as one reliable system.

trustLead.en: WillowSoft supports connected products across industrial automation, healthcare, energy, telecommunications, logistics and consumer technology teams.

problemTitle.en: Most industrial digital projects fail between prototype and field deployment.

problemLeadOne.en: Hardware teams, firmware teams, backend teams, mobile teams — each one handed off to a different vendor. The result is integration failures, missed deadlines, and products that never reach production.

problemLeadTwo.en: WillowSoft owns every layer. One team. One contract. One working system.

productsTitle.en: Field-ready LoRaWAN products for industrial monitoring.

industriesTitle.en: Built for environments where reliability matters.

newsTitle.en: Recent signals from the WillowSoft ecosystem.

ctaTitle.en: Ready to build a connected product or industrial platform?

ctaLead.en: Tell us whether you need hardware, firmware, backend, PostgreSQL, mobile app, web dashboard, website, VR simulation, or the complete system.

heroLead.en: Modules, environmental sensors, tracking devices, safety products, and industrial interfaces for reliable remote monitoring.

featuredTitle.en: LoRaWAN modules and sensors ready for real deployments.

heroLead.en: Events, export milestones, workshops and engineering updates should work as proof for enterprise customers.

latestTitle.en: Proof that WillowSoft is active in the field.

pipelineTitle.en: Use news, events and product launches to drive qualified leads.

pipelineLead.en: The admin panel can add new news items without touching code. Featured updates can later be surfaced on Home and Company pages.

heroTitle.en: From embedded hardware to the digital interface.

heroLead.en: We build the technical layers that make connected products work: hardware, firmware, backend APIs, PostgreSQL, mobile apps, web platforms, admin panels, websites, and VR simulations.

processTitle.en: A cleaner path from idea to deployed system.

stackTitle.en: The background moves like the system itself.

stackLead.en: Behind the technology cards, animated nodes and pulses represent sensor data traveling from device to gateway, backend, database, dashboard, mobile app, and VR layer.

digitalTitle.en: Software services that complete the connected product.

vrLead.en: VR is positioned as engineering support, not entertainment: training operators, demonstrating products, simulating maintenance, and visualizing digital twins.

heroTitle.en: Industrial IoT solutions for real-world operations.

heroLead.en: We connect distributed assets, buildings, machines, utilities, and logistics systems with low-power hardware and scalable digital platforms.

useCasesTitle.en: Built for environments where reliability matters.

howTitle.en: Sensors report, gateways connect, platforms act.

howLead.en: The moving background represents distributed field data. In the real system, each device sends telemetry into APIs, PostgreSQL, dashboards, mobile alerts, and reporting tools.

whyTitle.en: Solutions are engineered around the site, not forced onto it.

introTitle.en: We do not just build devices; we engineer reliable ecosystems.

introLead.en: Founded in 2020, WillowSoft delivers embedded hardware and software solutions for industrial and IoT applications. The team focuses on low-power architecture, LoRa connectivity, firmware reliability, custom hardware design, backend systems, mobile and web interfaces, and production readiness.

principlesTitle.en: Engineering principles we don't compromise on.

historyTitle.en: From R&D roots to global deployment.

workWithTitle.en: Global teams trust WillowSoft for one reason: we deliver.

ctaTitle.en: Ready to build with a team that owns the full stack?

ctaLead.en: Tell us what you're building. We'll tell you how we'd approach it.

heroTitle.en: Let’s build the future of your industry.

heroLead.en: Tell us whether you need hardware, firmware, backend API, PostgreSQL architecture, admin panel, mobile app, website, web dashboard, VR simulation, or the complete connected product ecosystem.

directLead.en: Phone and WhatsApp numbers should be confirmed before production launch.

heroTitle.en: Scale your connected product without engineering fragmentation.

realityTitle.en: Most industrial digital projects fail between prototype and field deployment.

pathsTitle.en: Choose the path that matches your project.

formLead.en: This landing page intentionally has no full menu. It keeps campaign traffic focused on one action: sending a qualified project request.
